ddls:
CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject or title of the topic */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was last updated */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the board or category where the topic is posted */,
  "starter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the topic */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the topic */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the topic (e.g., open, closed, locked) */,
  "views_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the views were last updated */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Total number of likes for the topic */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Total number of replies for the topic */,
  "last_replied_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the last reply was posted */,
  "last_replier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the last reply */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_last_replier_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_replier_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES boards ("board_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_starter_id FOREIGN KEY ("starter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boards" (
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each board */,
  "board_name" TEXT /* Name of the board or category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the board or category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the board was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the board was last updated */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who moderates the board */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("board_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boards_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic where the comment is posted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "posted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was posted */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Total number of likes for the comment */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Total number of replies for the comment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., active, deleted, hidden) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "last_activity_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last active on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the profile */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the user's website */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role-permission relationship was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the topic */,
  "viewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was viewed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who viewed the topic */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user who viewed the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_views_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like event */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic being liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the topic */,
  "liked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was liked */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who liked the topic */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user who liked the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_likes_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
